data.title: Nano Nuclear Energy, Inc. stock rises as Q1 loss narrows, reporting a loss of 13 cents per share (vs. expected 29 cents).
data.description: Nano Nuclear Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: NNE) saw a surge in its shares during after-hours trading on Tuesday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The report revealed a smaller loss per share than expected, with quarterly losses at 13 cents per share compared to the anticipated 29 cents per share. The company projects around $65 million in estimated cash expenditures in the upcoming period. For more information, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com. Keep an eye on NNE stock for further price movements.

data.title: Stock market sees Dow and Nasdaq gain slightly, Nasdaq breaks losing streak, gold and silver stocks fall.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Nasdaq managed to break a losing streak but only marginally. Small-cap stocks closed unchanged after experiencing volatile trading throughout the day. The Dow Jones and Nasdaq saw slight gains. On the other hand, companies involved in gold and silver saw a decline. This information was brought to you by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Robotics sector booming with $71.2B market value; 541,302 industrial units installed in 2023. VanEck predicts growth in healthcare, logistics.
data.description: The worldwide robotics industry, estimated to be worth $71.2 billion, saw the installation of 541,302 industrial units in the year 2023. VanEck anticipates a growth trend extending beyond factory settings, with a move towards integration into logistics and healthcare sectors.

data.title: Westminster hosts 2026 Tet Parade with 15,000 attendees and 250,000 viewers expected on Feb 21.
data.description: The Tet Parade in Westminster scheduled for February 21, 2026, is anticipated to draw a crowd of over 15,000 attendees, while an audience of more than 250,000 is expected to watch remotely. Taking place in Westminster, California, this annual event, known as the Tet Parade, is organized by the City of Westminster.

data.title: Transocean Ltd. announces 2025 Q4 and full-year financial results, to host conference call on Feb 20 at 9 am EST.
data.description: In Steinhause, Switzerland, on February 19, 2026, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast on Friday, February 20, 2026, at 9 a.m. EST and 3 p.m. CET to analyze the outcomes. Interested parties can access the call using the details provided in the announcement. Furthermore, additional presentation slides can be found on the Investors segment of Transocean Ltd.'s website at www.deepwater.com.

data.title: CPI Card Group Inc. will host a webcast on March 5, 2026, to discuss its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results.
data.description: Littleton, Colorado-based CPI Card Group Inc., listed on Nasdaq as PMTS, a leading payments technology firm offering various payment solutions, revealed it will conduct a webcast and conference call on March 5, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET to talk about its financial performance in Q4 and full year of 2025. The company's Q4 financial results are set to be disclosed before the market opens on the same day.

data.title: Sandisk Corp (NASDAQ: SNDK) to participate in upcoming investor conferences on Feb 25, Mar 3, and more.
data.description: Sandisk Corporation (NASDAQ: SNDK) from Milpitas, California, announced their participation in upcoming investor conferences: Bernstein Insights: What’s Next in Tech? 4th Annual TMT Forum on February 25, 2026, at 3:30 p.m. PT / 6:30 p.m. ET; Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 3, 2026, at 4:50 p.m. PT / 7:50 p.m. ET; and Cantor Global Technology & Industrial Growth Conference on a date to be announced.

data.title: Florida is ranked #1 in workforce education, reaching this goal five years early, fulfilling executive order 19-31.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida on February 19, 2026, Governor Ron DeSantis celebrated Career and Technical Education (CTE) month by declaring that Florida has secured the top spot in the United States for workforce education. This accomplishment, in compliance with Executive Order 19-31, was achieved five years earlier than the targeted year of 2030.

data.title: Blue Owl Capital's decision to restrict investors from demanding set funds raises concerns in the private credit sector.
data.description: Concerns arose in the private credit industry after the lender disclosed a new policy preventing investors from requesting a predetermined sum from its funds. This announcement has raised alarms among investors and industry professionals about the implications on the sector’s stability and potential impacts on investment strategies.

data.title: Transocean Ltd. released a quarterly Fleet Status Report on Feb. 19, 2026 detailing contract information for their offshore drilling rigs.
data.description: In Steinhause, Switzerland on February 19, 2026, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) released its quarterly Fleet Status Report detailing the current status and contract details of its offshore drilling rigs. This report offers insights into the performance and operational updates of the company's fleet.

data.title: San Juan Basin Royalty Trust Trustee reveals Hilcorp's 2026 Capital Plan for Subject Interests, Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026 in Dallas, the San Juan Basin Royalty Trust, with the ticker symbol SJT, shared an update through Argent Trust Company, serving as the trustee. They revealed that on February 18, 2026, the operator of the Trust's Subject Interests, Hilcorp Energy, took a significant step.
